name: Vili
description:
A young looking woman with sizable demonic horns sprouting from her head and shoulder length teal hair with purple bows on the sides under her horns, right above her long pointed ears. She's wearing a studded black leather collar around her neck, and her huge breasts are barely contained by her top, and her top is only restrained by strings criss crossing the center, where you can see her deep, captivating cleavage in all it's glory.
Her arms are adorned in shoulder length black gloves. And behind her trim waist you can see small bat-like wings spreading outwards. Her hips wear a short teal and black checkered skirt with a leather belt adorned in a small cartoonish skull and a chain on one side. You can see her V-string underwear wrapped around her hips above her skirt. A long spaded tail sways behind her, and she wears long black thigh-highs on her legs.
